name: planet_wars
title: Planet Wars
description: Bit-exact port of the 2009/2010 Google AI Challenge Planet Wars competition. Two players battle for control of a galaxy of planets by sending fleets of ships across point-symmetric maps.

action.description: List of fleet orders. Each order is [source_planet_id, dest_planet_id, num_ships]. Empty list is a legal no-op turn.

episodeSteps.description: Maximum number of turns. Game ends and the player with more total ships wins.

actTimeout.description: Maximum runtime (seconds) to obtain an action from an agent.

runTimeout.description: Maximum runtime (seconds) of an episode (not necessarily DONE).

agentTimeout.description: Obsolete field kept for backwards compatibility, please use observation.remainingOverageTime.

map.description: Either "random" (procedurally generate a map from the seed) or a raw map text starting with "P " using the original Planet Wars Point-in-Time format.

seed.description: Seed for procedural map generation. If null, the interpreter resolves it to a random integer and writes it back into configuration.seed for reproducibility. The seed is intentionally NOT hidden: the map is fully observable in observation.planets from turn 0, so there is nothing to conceal.

remainingOverageTime.description: Total remaining banked time (seconds) that can be used in excess of per-step actTimeouts -- agent is disqualified with TIMEOUT status when this drops below 0.

planets.description: List of planets: [id, x, y, owner, num_ships, growth_rate]. owner is 0 (neutral), 1, or 2.

fleets.description: List of in-flight fleets: [owner, num_ships, source_planet, dest_planet, total_trip, turns_remaining].

player.description: This agent's owner id in the global state. Agent 0 plays as owner 1, agent 1 plays as owner 2.

reward.description: Final outcome: 1 for the winner, -1 for the loser, 0 for a draw. Forfeits (invalid actions) get reward null.
